dict.string: GEMS 2.0 needs media library access to attach audio and video files to work order reports and maintenance documentation.

GEMS 2.0 needs camera access to capture photos for work order documentation, equipment maintenance records, and site inspection reports. Photos are geotagged to verify maintenance work location and prevent fraud.
GEMS 2.0 uses Face ID or Touch ID to let you sign in securely without typing your password.
GEMS 2.0 requires location access to verify that maintenance work is performed at the correct site location. This prevents fraudulent work submissions and ensures work order accuracy.
GEMS 2.0 requires location access to verify that maintenance work is performed at the correct site location. This prevents fraudulent work submissions and ensures work order accuracy.
GEMS 2.0 requires location access to verify that maintenance work is performed at the correct site location. This prevents fraudulent work submissions and ensures work order accuracy.
GEMS 2.0 needs photo library access to attach existing photos to work orders, upload profile pictures, and access maintenance documentation images.
